title: cswitch
summary: A Go CLI to manage multiple Claude Code profiles — switch accounts without repeated login/logout.
body:
A small, fast command-line tool that lets you keep several Claude Code accounts side by side and switch between them instantly — no more logging out and back in. Written in Go for a single self-contained binary.

(Expand this case study with the problem it solved for you, how it works, and what you learned.)

title: Django Test-Case Generator
summary: A Django app that generates test cases automatically from your urls.py.
body:
A developer-experience tool that reads a Django project's URL configuration and scaffolds test cases for each route, so a codebase gets baseline test coverage with far less boilerplate.

(Expand this case study with the approach and impact.)

title: E-commerce REST API
summary: A token-authenticated RESTful e-commerce API built with Django and Django REST Framework.
body:
A backend for an e-commerce platform: token-secured REST endpoints for products, carts, and orders, built on Django REST Framework.

(Expand this case study with the data model, auth flow, and anything notable.)

title: Django + GraphQL + React
summary: A full-stack app pairing a Django GraphQL backend with a React front end.
body:
A full-stack example wiring a Django GraphQL API to a React client — schema-driven data fetching end to end.

(Expand this case study with what it demonstrates and the trade-offs you hit.)
